svg.title: Community pollution reporting system architecture
svg.desc: Full data flow from user reports and satellite data through backend processing to route map display

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields does a user pollution report contain?')
sendPrompt('How does Sentinel-5P satellite data get fetched?')
sendPrompt('What weather parameters come from OpenMeteo?')
sendPrompt('How does the report validator work and what is trust scoring?')
sendPrompt('How does the data fusion engine merge satellite, weather, and user reports?')
sendPrompt('How does the anomaly detector and root cause classifier work?')
sendPrompt('How should users report garbage fire incidents with duration?')
sendPrompt('How should users report industrial pollution with ongoing duration?')
sendPrompt('How should users report crackers or festival pollution?')
sendPrompt('What other pollution types can users report like dust or vehicles?')

svg.text: Unified pollution layer (combined on route map)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the pollution data shown as an overlay on the route map?')
sendPrompt('How do push alerts work when a pollution event is reported near a user?')
sendPrompt('What does the admin dashboard show for pollution reports and anomalies?')

svg.text: Fire (hours→days) → fades on map as time passes
